title: AuditEvent
description: Normalized record of a security-relevant system event. All authorization decisions, policy changes, identity lifecycle events, and emergency overrides are expressed as AuditEvent records. Field names are stable external identifiers — they must not be renamed once in production use.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record. UUID v4. Auto-generated if not supplied.

event_type.description: Category of the event. Used for filtering and routing in the audit pipeline.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred (not the time it was written to storage). Must include timezone offset.

schema_version.description: AuditEvent schema revision in effect when this record was written. Consumers use this to determine which fields are available. Current value: '1.1'.

request_id.description: DecisionRequest.request_id. Links this audit record to the corresponding request and response. Null for events not associated with a DecisionRequest.

decision_id.description: Identifier for the decision itself. Defaults to request_id when not separately assigned. Allows systems that assign their own decision IDs to carry that identifier in the audit record.

correlation_id.description: Optional caller-provided trace identifier for cross-system correlation (e.g., HTTP request ID, distributed trace ID, batch job ID). Passed through from the caller verbatim.

subject_id.description: Stable identifier of the subject. Null for system events with no associated principal.

subject_name.description: Human-readable subject label. Null for system events.

subject_type.description: SubjectType value. Null for system events.

subject_roles.description: Roles held by the subject at the time of the event. Empty for system events or subjects without role assignments.

action.description: Action name. Stable external identifier — appears verbatim in stored records.

resource_id.description: Normalized resource identifier. Null if the event is not resource-specific.

resource_type.description: ResourceType value (e.g., 'hvac', 'sensor', 'device'). Null if the event is not resource-specific.

outcome.description: Outcome for authorization_decision events. Null for non-decision event types.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the outcome. Null for non-decision events.

evaluated_by.description: Name of the rule or component that produced the final decision. Null for non-decision events.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy set in effect at evaluation time.

matched_rules.description: Names of policy rules that returned allow or deny (not not_applicable) during evaluation. Empty for non-decision events or when no rules matched.

trace.description: Per-rule evaluation history explaining why this decision was produced. Null when trace data was not collected.

final_outcome.description: The aggregated outcome produced by the engine.

short_circuited.description: True if evaluation stopped early because a DENY was found. Remaining rules were not evaluated.

evaluated_rules.description: Per-rule outcomes in evaluation order, up to and including the rule that determined the final outcome.

rule_name.description: Name of the rule (evaluated_by field from the rule's Decision).

reason.description: Reason string from the rule's Decision.

detail.description: Arbitrary key/value context specific to this event.
